originalTitle: Stock Futures Open Mixed, Kicking Off Week that Includes Fed Minutes
summary: The central bank’s June minutes will be the economic highlight. And Wall Street is looking to build on the past week’s nice gains.
content: The central bank’s June minutes will be the economic highlight. And Wall Street is looking to build on the past week’s nice gains.
chineseTitle: 股票期货开盘涨跌不一，拉开包括美联储会议纪要在内的一周
chineseSummary: 央行六月会议纪要将成为经济亮点。华尔街正寻求在过去一周的良好涨幅的基础上再接再厉。
chineseContent: 央行六月会议纪要将成为经济亮点。华尔街正寻求在过去一周的良好涨幅的基础上再接再厉。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
